urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: France passes law banning under-15s from social media
latest.summary: The law will mean everyone in France must verify their age to access social media. From September, people under 15 will not be able to open accounts, and age verification will be required on all new accounts.
latest.details: The law will mean everyone in France must verify their age to access social media. From September, people under 15 will not be able to open accounts, and age verification will be required on all new accounts. French Digital Minister Anne Le Hénanff defended the speed of the law's implementation, stating that age-verification tools already exist. France is the second country to introduce a ban on underage social media use, following Australia.
latest.full_brief: The law will mean everyone in France must verify their age to access social media. From September, people under 15 will not be able to open accounts, and age verification will be required on all new accounts. French Digital Minister Anne Le Hénanff defended the speed of the law's implementation, stating that age-verification tools already exist. France is the second country to introduce a ban on underage social media use, following Australia.

latest.title: Michelin-starred restaurateur faces jail for using ants as dessert garnish
latest.summary: South Korean prosecutors sought a one-year jail term for the owner of a Michelin-starred restaurant accused of using ants as a dessert garnish. The restaurant, which holds two Michelin stars, could also face a fine of 20 million Korean won.
latest.details: South Korean prosecutors sought a one-year jail term for the owner of a Michelin-starred restaurant accused of using ants as a dessert garnish. The restaurant, which holds two Michelin stars, could also face a fine of 20 million Korean won. Investigators estimate that around 49,000 ants were used in several dishes over four years. The court is set to deliver its verdict on September 2.
latest.full_brief: South Korean prosecutors sought a one-year jail term for the owner of a Michelin-starred restaurant accused of using ants as a dessert garnish. The restaurant, which holds two Michelin stars, could also face a fine of 20 million Korean won. Investigators estimate that around 49,000 ants were used in several dishes over four years. The court is set to deliver its verdict on September 2.

latest.title: US renews strikes on Iran as Trump threatens to attack underground nuclear site
latest.summary: US Central Command reported that the wave of strikes were designed to degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping. Explosions were reported in multiple Iranian cities, including Tehran and Tabriz.
latest.details: US Central Command reported that the wave of strikes were designed to degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping. Explosions were reported in multiple Iranian cities, including Tehran and Tabriz. Iran warned of reprisals after Donald Trump threatened to attack an underground nuclear site. The US accused Iran of attacking over 30 commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz in the past three months.
latest.full_brief: US Central Command reported that the wave of strikes were designed to degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping. Explosions were reported in multiple Iranian cities, including Tehran and Tabriz. Iran warned of reprisals after Donald Trump threatened to attack an underground nuclear site. The US accused Iran of attacking over 30 commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz in the past three months.

latest.title: More young women in their 20s are getting type 2 diabetes
latest.summary: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women.
latest.details: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women. The disease can lead to severe complications, and early diagnosis is crucial to prevent long-term organ damage. Researchers suggest that newer obesity treatments may help manage the condition alongside lifestyle changes.
latest.full_brief: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women. The disease can lead to severe complications, and early diagnosis is crucial to prevent long-term organ damage. Researchers suggest that newer obesity treatments may help manage the condition alongside lifestyle changes.

latest.title: Tokyo urges men to wear shorts to work, but some women say it's 'leg hair harassment'
latest.summary: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government is encouraging employees to wear more casual attire, including shorts, during the summer months. Governor Yuriko Koike introduced the "Tokyo Cool Biz" initiative to help people cope with the heat.
latest.details: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government is encouraging employees to wear more casual attire, including shorts, during the summer months. Governor Yuriko Koike introduced the "Tokyo Cool Biz" initiative to help people cope with the heat. However, the policy has received mixed reactions, with some women feeling it is unfair as they are still required to wear tights. A survey indicated that 53.5% of respondents opposed wearing shorts to work.
latest.full_brief: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government is encouraging employees to wear more casual attire, including shorts, during the summer months. Governor Yuriko Koike introduced the "Tokyo Cool Biz" initiative to help people cope with the heat. However, the policy has received mixed reactions, with some women feeling it is unfair as they are still required to wear tights. A survey indicated that 53.5% of respondents opposed wearing shorts to work.

latest.title: A Week of Smoky Skies Across North America
latest.summary: Wildland fire activity in Canada increased in July 2026, leading to worsened air quality across parts of the U.S. and Canada. The animation tracked brown carbon emissions from the fires, which are a major component of PM 2.5 air pollution.
latest.details: Wildland fire activity in Canada increased in July 2026, leading to worsened air quality across parts of the U.S. and Canada. The animation tracked brown carbon emissions from the fires, which are a major component of PM 2.5 air pollution. On July 14, numerous fires had already cropped up, affecting air quality in several major cities. By July 19 and 20, storms began to clear the smoke in parts of the East, improving air quality.
latest.full_brief: Wildland fire activity in Canada increased in July 2026, leading to worsened air quality across parts of the U.S. and Canada. The animation tracked brown carbon emissions from the fires, which are a major component of PM 2.5 air pollution. On July 14, numerous fires had already cropped up, affecting air quality in several major cities. By July 19 and 20, storms began to clear the smoke in parts of the East, improving air quality.

latest.title: Japan records its first ‘cruelly hot day’ as cities swelter in 40-degree heat
latest.summary: Japan's meteorological agency introduced the term kokushobi to alert the public about extreme heat dangers. The first official kokushobi day was recorded when temperatures exceeded 40 degrees Celsius in several cities.
latest.details: Japan's meteorological agency introduced the term kokushobi to alert the public about extreme heat dangers. The first official kokushobi day was recorded when temperatures exceeded 40 degrees Celsius in several cities. Gujo and Toyota set all-time high records at their weather stations. The rising temperatures are impacting agriculture, prompting farmers to plant heat-tolerant crops.
latest.full_brief: Japan's meteorological agency introduced the term kokushobi to alert the public about extreme heat dangers. The first official kokushobi day was recorded when temperatures exceeded 40 degrees Celsius in several cities. Gujo and Toyota set all-time high records at their weather stations. The rising temperatures are impacting agriculture, prompting farmers to plant heat-tolerant crops.

latest.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 2026: How to watch
latest.summary: Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked event is scheduled for July 22nd at 9AM ET in London. The event will showcase new devices, including the Galaxy Z Fold 8, which is rumored to have a significant redesign.
latest.details: Samsung's Galaxy Unpacked event is scheduled for July 22nd at 9AM ET in London. Leaks suggest the Galaxy Z Fold 8 may feature a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite processor and dual 50MP cameras. Additionally, Samsung is expected to unveil new wearables, including the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.

latest.title: Canada cancels joint bridge-opening celebration with US amid trade tensions
latest.summary: Canada has canceled a joint celebration with the US for the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge due to trade tensions. This decision follows President Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on Canadian goods.
latest.details: Canada has canceled a joint celebration with the US for the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge due to trade tensions. This decision follows President Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on Canadian goods. Canada plans to hold its own ceremony, while the US's participation remains uncertain. The bridge, which connects Detroit and Windsor, is a significant infrastructure project costing nearly $4.4 billion.
latest.full_brief: Canada has canceled a joint celebration with the US for the opening of the Gordie Howe International Bridge due to trade tensions. This decision follows President Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on Canadian goods. Canada plans to hold its own ceremony, while the US's participation remains uncertain. The bridge, which connects Detroit and Windsor, is a significant infrastructure project costing nearly $4.4 billion.

latest.title: NISAR’s L-Band Radar Reveals ‘Hummingbird’ in Antarctica
latest.summary: The NISAR satellite's L-band radar has produced an image of Nunatak Zaterjavshijsja in East Antarctica. This mountaintop is surrounded by a stream of ice, causing stresses that lead to deep cracks known as crevasses.
latest.details: The NISAR satellite's L-band radar has produced an image of Nunatak Zaterjavshijsja in East Antarctica. This mountaintop is surrounded by a stream of ice, causing stresses that lead to deep cracks known as crevasses. The image, nicknamed 'the hummingbird,' was created using polarized microwave signals. NISAR is the first satellite to carry two SAR instruments at different wavelengths.
latest.full_brief: The NISAR satellite's L-band radar has produced an image of Nunatak Zaterjavshijsja in East Antarctica. This mountaintop is surrounded by a stream of ice, causing stresses that lead to deep cracks known as crevasses. The image, nicknamed 'the hummingbird,' was created using polarized microwave signals. NISAR is the first satellite to carry two SAR instruments at different wavelengths.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.
